plan_metadata.name: Sample Da Ristorante Api Local Debug

steps.description: Type text: 'Browse the menu ' into the search input field located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the blue "Create" filter button in the Samples gallery of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code. Add ${{var:app_name:Welcome}} in to env.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: python

```python
import sys
import ruamel.yaml
import os

file_path = '/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/m365agents.local.yml'
if not os.path.isfile(file_path):
    print(f'File not found: {file_path}')
    sys.exit(1)

yaml = ruamel.yaml.YAML()
yaml.preserve_quotes = True

def update_version(data):
    if isinstance(data, dict):
        for key, value in data.items():
            if key == 'version' and str(value) == '~4.0.5530':
                data[key] = '^4.0.5530'
            else:
                update_version(value)
    elif isinstance(data, list):
        for item in data:
            update_version(item)

with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
    data = yaml.load(f)
    
update_version(data)

with open(file_path, 'w') as f:
    yaml.dump(data, f)
print('Version updated if found.')
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Version updated if found.

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description:
@code open yaml file `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/m365agents.local.yml`, Update the YAML file.
Replace:
version: "~4.0.5530"
With:

Preserve all formatting.

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: python

```python
import json
import os

input_path = '/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/.vscode/launch.json'
backup_path = input_path + '.bak'

# Verify file exists
if not os.path.isfile(input_path):
    print(f'File not found: {input_path}')
    exit(1)

# Read file as text (preserving formatting)
with open(input_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Make the replacement
old_url = 'https://www.office.com/chat?auth=2'
new_url = ('https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/entity1-d870f6cd-4aa5-4d42-9626-ab690c041429/'
           '${local:agent-hint}?auth=2&developerMode=Basic')

if old_url not in content:
    print('No replacement made: old URL not found.')
else:
    # Backup original file
    with open(backup_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as bf:
        bf.write(content)
    # Write updated content
    updated = content.replace(old_url, new_url)
    with open(input_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as of:
        of.write(updated)
    print('Replacement successful.')
    print(f'Backup saved to {backup_path}')
```

=== Execution Results ===
Exit Code: 0

=== STDOUT ===
Replacement successful.
Backup saved to /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/.vscode/launch.json.bak

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description:
@code open json file `/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/da-ristorante-api/.vscode/launch.json`, Update the json file.
Replace all places:
`https://www.office.com/chat?auth=2`
With:
`https://m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/entity1-d870f6cd-4aa5-4d42-9626-ab690c041429/${local:agent-hint}?auth=2&developerMode=Basic`
Preserve all formatting.
Click the center area of the Visual Studio Code editor workspace, where no file or tab is open, to set focus or prepare for further actions.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code, within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace.
Type the text 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input field at the top center of the interface.
Press Enter to select the highlighted "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type the text 'Debug in Copilot (Chrome)' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top center of the application window.
Press the Enter key to select "Debug in Copilot (Chrome)" from the command palette dropdown in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click on the "Email or phone" input field within the Microsoft sign-in page in Google Chrome to set focus for entering credentials.

Click the "No" button on the Microsoft "Stay signed in?" prompt during login at login.microsoftonline.com within a Chrome browser window. The crosshair is positioned precisely over the "No" button, ensuring selection of the option to not stay signed in.
Reduce the zoom level of the Copilot Chat web interface in Microsoft Edge by pressing the keyboard shortcut Ctrl + - while focused on the main "Welcome to Copilot Chat" screen.
Refresh the Microsoft 365 Copilot chat interface in Google Chrome by pressing the F5 key.
Click on the "Message Copilot" input box in the Il Ristorante chat interface within the M365 Copilot web application, positioning the cursor to start a new message.
Type "What's for lunch today?" into the chat input box of the "Il Ristorante" agent in the M365 Copilot Chat web interface, then click the send arrow button.
Press the Enter key to submit the "What's for lunch today?" text input in the Il Ristorante chat interface within the M365 Copilot web application.
